storySection.subtitle: Our Philosophy
storySection.title: We believe your digital life deserves more tenderness.
storySection.description: In a world of aluminum, glass, and plastic, we bring back warmth. Tissu creates beautifully tailored protection for your most important tools.

testimonialSection.title: About Tissu
testimonialSection.quote1: Beautiful material and amazing texture. My laptop deserves protection that is a joy to touch.
testimonialSection.quote2: Minimalist design that feels intentional in every detail. Pure local quality.

about.title: Crafting accessories that wrap your daily life in comfort.
about.desc1: Tissu started with a simple idea: the tools we use every day shouldn't be cold and impersonal. They should be beautiful, tactile, and crafted with care.
about.philDesc1: In a world of aluminum, glass, and plastic, we wanted to bring back warmth. Your laptop is the primary tool for your ideas and work - its protection should be just as valuable.
about.philDesc2: We use premium textiles that give you a special feeling - naturally worn organic cotton, luxurious linen, and a lightweight but reliable felted core.

quality1.title: Eco-friendly Materials
quality1.desc: We only use certified organic cotton and recycled PET padding to reduce environmental impact while maintaining maximum softness.

quality2.title: Handcrafted Construction
quality2.desc: Every detail matters. From reinforced seams to hidden magnetic closures that won't scratch your device.

quality3.title: Designed in Georgia
quality3.desc: Designed in Tbilisi. We combine local inspiration with a timeless minimalist aesthetic to create a global product.

contact.title: We'd love to hear from you.
contact.subtitle: If you have questions about products, shipping, returns, or just want to say hello - we're here.
